title: The dilemma of a closet nerd HELP
display_title: The dilemma of a closet nerd HELP
wikitext:
[]: The dilemma of a closet nerd :( ï¿½HELP! Post by closet nerd » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:20 pm I am a closet nerd. No one knows that I like Star-trek, Evangelion, Naruto, Gundom, and lord of the rings.... how do I watch neon genesis, or rebuild, without buying the dvds? Every website I go to whats me to download a plug in to watch their stuff. NO WAY IN HELL, I AM NOT THAT STUPIT!! Also, were do you meat other eva fans if eva doesn't come to Comicon :( O ya btw this is a repost cos I accidentally put it in the fan fiction catagory.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:23 pm Stop being closet nerd

[]: Post by closet nerd » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:31 pm Problem 1: Im like 16 so I live with my parents who disapprove of every thing nerdy or anime related. Problem 2: Im to shy to admit to friends I love anime and star-treck + i dont think I would ever be able to date another girl ever again - like ever ever.... ever! I would walk up to them and they would run in terror, expecting BO and pocket protectors

[]: Post by symbv » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:33 pm Oh, no streaming site for Eva ?

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 06, 2011 8:21 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=476041#476041
